content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Psychos in a Line". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/319/problem/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of people in the line. The second line contains n space-separated integers representing the heights of the people in the line.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the minimum number of psychos that need to be removed so that the remaining people are in non-decreasing order of height.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the length of the longest increasing subsequence in the array of heights.
